scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:web
scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter @tuckmark/core build && bun run --filter @tuckmark/server build && bun run --filter @tuckmark/cli build && bun run --filter @tuckmark/mcp build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.test: bun run test:packages && bun run test:web
scripts.test:packages: bun run --filter @tuckmark/core test && bun run --filter @tuckmark/server test && bun run --filter @tuckmark/cli test && bun run --filter @tuckmark/mcp test
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --filter @tuckmark/core typecheck && bun run --filter @tuckmark/server typecheck && bun run --filter @tuckmark/cli typecheck && bun run --filter @tuckmark/mcp typecheck
